title: baseflowx: An open-source Python package for baseflow separation
description: baseflowx is an open-source Python package that implements 17 baseflow separation methods across four methodological paradigms (recursive digital filters, graphical hydrograph-partitioning, recession-based, and tracer-based approaches) behind a consistent interface, with built-in USGS data retrieval and a conductivity mass balance (CMB) module. It is the software accompanying the manuscript 'A literature review of baseflow separation algorithms and an accompanying computational package'.
